expected_outcome: Competent Data Scientist skilled in extracting insights from data, building statistical models, designing interactive dashboards, and running machine learning pipelines.

phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily writing SQL queries on platforms like LeetCode and building simple Python analysis scripts.

mini_project.title: Database Querying & Statistical Report
mini_project.description: Write complex SQL queries to pull customer transaction history from a database and write a Python script using pandas to summarize key statistics.

phases.milestone: Proficient in SQL data extraction and basics of descriptive statistics using Python.

topics.name: Data Manipulation with Pandas
subtopics: Loading CSV, Excel, and JSON data

phases.practice_schedule: 2.5 Hours daily downloading public datasets (e.g. from Kaggle) and performing thorough cleaning and visualization.

mini_project.title: Real-World Dataset Cleaning & Viz
mini_project.description: Take a dirty raw dataset, clean all missing and corrupt values, perform correlation analysis, and compile a dashboard of visualizations.

phases.milestone: Mastered Pandas, data cleaning, and statistical data visualization techniques.

topics.name: Supervised Learning
subtopics: Decision Trees & Ensemble Methods (Random Forest, XGBoost)

phases.practice_schedule: 2.5 Hours daily training models on structured datasets using Scikit-Learn.

mini_project.title: Churn Prediction Model
mini_project.description: Develop a classification model using XGBoost to predict customer churn, evaluate it using a confusion matrix, and tune its hyperparameters.

phases.milestone: Comfortable building, evaluating, and improving predictive models on structured tables.

topics.name: Interactive Dashboards
subtopics: Streamlit framework for Python web apps

phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily converting predictive models into interactive dashboards.

mini_project.title: Interactive Analytics Web App
mini_project.description: Build a Streamlit dashboard that lets users upload a CSV file, view statistical summaries, and run predictions using a saved machine learning model.

phases.milestone: Capable of translating technical data models into visual business reports and interactive apps.

major_projects.title: Real Estate Valuation System & Dashboard
major_projects.description: A complete data science product: extracts house listings using python scrapers, runs a cleaning ETL pipeline, trains an ensemble model to predict prices, and hosts an interactive Streamlit app with geospatial visualizations.

major_projects.title: A/B Testing & User Behavior Dashboard
major_projects.description: Design an experimental framework, analyze simulated clickstream user data, perform statistical significance testing (Z-test, Chi-square), and build a Tableau/Streamlit dashboard demonstrating the business impact.
